description: Composition Yellow V-neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and print on the chest Fit Comfort Wash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash or use fabric softeners Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Use mild detergent only Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Sport brand adidas comes up with this simple, feminine tee with floral print encircling the branding. Wear this under your jersey or sweatshirt for absolute warmth. On sunny weekends, style this with denim skirts or skinny jeans! Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
